description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:2-alpine Docker image and defines two stages: test and build. Add a tests job in the test stage that runs the exact command "pip install pytest==3.0.5 && py.test simple_lib/tests/ -v". Add a wheel job in the build stage that runs "python setup.py bdist_wheel" and publishes the "dist/" directory as an artifact that expires after one week. No caches, rules, or additional services are required.
